rules.rule_text:
import "pe"

rule win_revshell : feature networking windows
{
	meta:
		description = "Imports Win reverse shell"

	condition:
		uint16be( 0 ) == 0x4d5a and pe.imports ( "wsock32.dll" , "WSAStartup" ) and pe.imports ( "wsock32.dll" , "WSASocketA" ) and pe.imports ( "wsock32.dll" , "connect" ) and pe.imports ( "kernel32.dll" , "CreateProcessA" )
}
